name: answer_fallback
description: Tier-2 grounded answer. Route to a reference entry and read it; if nothing in the KB matched (context is empty), fall back to a hybrid search over the dotnet refdocs corpus; then answer from whatever context was found. Demonstrates the `branch` and `search` primitives.
whenToUse: Answer a question or look something up, falling back to a documentation search when the knowledge base does not cover it.
